data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select tab.loan_request_amount - tab.principal_amount - tab.interest_amount - ( tab.fee_amount + tab.fund_new + tab.buy_share - tab.fund_ret ) as real_amount ---เงินรับจริง ที่กดได้จริง ,tab.* from ( SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_amount,
( select nvl(sum(fund_new),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_new where sc_lon_m_req_fund_new.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as fund_new
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 ) as fund_ret
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no = 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_old
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_50
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_int),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_int_50
, FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) as loan_type , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type )) as loan_type_description ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_date, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd/mm/yyyy' ) as begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd month')||' '||'พ.ศ.'||to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'yyyy') as thia_begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as start_keep_tdate , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan as principal_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint as interest_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share ,( select nvl(sum( tbl_req_fee.amount ) ,0) from sc_lon_m_req_fee tbl_req_fee where tbl_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as fee_amount
,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_desc
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as item_amount
, (select sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_bank where sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code ) as bank_name
, (select sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch.bank_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch where sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch.bank_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code and sc_acc_m_ucf_bank_branch.bank_branch_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.branch_code ) as bank_branch_name
, pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X' ) as bank_acc_no
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_branch , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid
WHERE 1=2 --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between to_date('2020-7-15 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and to_date('2020-7-15 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no )tab
